title: 江苏省中小学生知识竞赛题库
content: 江苏省中小学生知识竞赛题库

title: 海伦公式的证明(勾股定理)
content:
用勾股定理证明海伦公式


使用Pandoc，渲染较慢，如果看到未渲染的页面，请稍等一下

如图：  $$
\begin{aligned}
h^2=a^2-x^2&=b^2-(c-x)^2\\
a^2-x^2&=b^2-(c-x)^2\\
a^2-x^2&=b^2-(c^2-2cx+x^2)\\
a^2-x^2&=b^2-c^2+2cx-x^2\\
a^2&=b^2-c^2+2cx\\
2cx&=a^2-b^2+c^2\\
x&=\frac{a^2-b^2+c^2}{2c}\\
\end{aligned}
$$
$$
\begin{aligned}
h^2 &=a^2-x^2 \\
&=a^2-(\frac{a^2-b^2+c^2}{2c})^2\\
&=(a+\frac{a^2-b^2+c^2}{2c})(a-\frac{a^2-b^2+c^2}{2c})\\
&=\frac{2ac+a^2-b^2+c^2}{2c}\times\frac{2ac-a^2+b^2-c^2}{2c}\\
&=\frac{(a+c)^2-b^2}{2c}\times\frac{b^2-(a^2-2ac+c^2)}{2c}\\
&=\frac{(a+c)^2-b^2}{2c}\times\frac{b^2-(a-c)^2}{2c}\\
&=\frac{(a+c+b)(a+c-b)}{2c}\times\frac{(b+a-c)(b-a+c)}{2c}\\
&=\frac{(a+c+b)(a+c-b)(b+a-c)(b-a+c)}{4c^2}
\end{aligned}
$$
$$
\begin{aligned}
    h&=\sqrt{\frac{(a+c+b)(a+c-b)(b+a-c)(b-a+c)}{4c^2}}\\
    \therefore
S=\frac{1}{2}ch&=\frac{1}{2}c\sqrt{\frac{(a+c+b)(a+c-b)(b+a-c)(b-a+c)}{4c^2}}\\
    &=\sqrt{\frac{1}{4}c^2\times\frac{(a+c+b)(a+c-b)(b+a-c)(b-a+c)}{4c^2}}\\
    &=\sqrt{\frac{(a+c+b)(a+c-b)(b+a-c)(b-a+c)}{16}}\\
    &=\sqrt{\frac{a+c+b}{2}\times\frac{a+c-b}{2}\times\frac{b+a-c}{2}\times\frac{b-a+c}{2}}\\
    &=\sqrt{\frac{a+b+c}{2}\times\frac{a-b+c}{2}\times\frac{a+b-c}{2}\times\frac{b-a+c}{2}}\\
\end{aligned}
$$ $$\text{设}p=\frac{a+b+c}{2}，则\frac{a-b+c}{2}=p-\frac{2b}{2}=p-b$$
$$以此类推 \frac{a+b-c}{2}=p-c
\frac{b-a+c}{2}=p-a$$
$$\therefore
S=\sqrt{p(p-a)(p-b)(p-c)}$$

title: 扣哒
content: hero.moveRight(5)hero.moveDown(5)hero.moveLeft(5)hero.moveUp(5)hero.moveUp(5)hero.moveRight(5)hero.moveDown(5)hero.moveLeft(5)hero.ability("shockTrap")hero.moveRight(5)def is_safe(x, y):    if x < 10 or x > 70 or y < 10 or y > 58:        return False    shadows = hero.findShadows()    for shadow in shadows:        if abs(x - shadow.x) < 6 and abs(y - shadow.y) < 6:            return False    return Truedef danger():    shadows = hero.findShadows()    for shadow in shadows:        if abs(hero.x - shadow.x) < 5 and abs(hero.y - shadow.y) < 5:            return True    return Falsewhile True:    if danger():        if is_safe(int(hero.x)+4, int(hero.y)):            hero.moveRight(1)            continue        if is_safe(int(hero.x)-4, int(hero.y)):            hero.moveLeft(1)            continue        if is_safe(int(hero.x), int(hero.y)+4):            hero.moveUp(1)            continue        if is_safe(int(hero.x), int(hero.y)-4):            hero.moveDown(1)            continue    x = int(hero.x)    y = int(hero.y)        if x < 16:        if is_safe(x+4, y):            hero.moveRight(1)            continue    if x > 64:        if is_safe(x-4, y):            hero.moveLeft(1)            continue    if y < 16:        if is_safe(x, y+4):            hero.moveUp(1)            continue    if y > 52:        if is_safe(x, y-4):            hero.moveDown(1)            continue    ex = int(hero.opponent.x)    ey = int(hero.opponent.y)    distance = hero.distanceTo(hero.opponent)        hero.ability("shockTrap")    if ex > x and is_safe(x+4, y):        hero.moveRight(1)    elif ex < x and is_safe(x-4, y):        hero.moveLeft(1)    elif ey > y and is_safe(x, y+4):        hero.moveUp(1)    elif ey < y and is_safe(x, y-4):        hero.moveDown(1)    else:        if is_safe(x+4, y):            hero.moveRight(1)        elif is_safe(x-4, y):            hero.moveLeft(1)        elif is_safe(x, y+4):            hero.moveUp(1)        else:            hero.moveDown(1)
